heroHeadline: FAB Eliminates JNIM Emir Torodo; JNIM-ISGS Rivalry Spreads Into Niger; WFP Cuts Aid to 2M
heroSubtitle: Tracking over a decade of jihadist insurgency, three coups, Wagner/Africa Corps presence, and the collapse of the Western-backed regional security architecture across Mali, Burkina Faso, and Niger.
footerNote: Data sourced from ACLED, RFI, Le Monde, Crisis Group, UN OHCHR, HRW, SIPRI, AFP, Bloomberg, Al Jazeera, and Institute for Economics & Peace. All figures approximate unless stated.
